message:
🐛 Use atomic temp→fsync→rename for settings file writes (#10629)

Replace os.WriteFile in saveLocked() with the same atomic write pattern
used in crypto.go's ensureKeyFile(): CreateTemp → Write → Chmod → Sync →
Close → Rename. This prevents a crash during write from corrupting the
settings file and silently destroying encrypted API keys/tokens.

Also makes Load() resilient to corrupted files — logs the error and falls
back to defaults instead of returning an error that blocks startup.

Fixes #10625

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
